title: Extracting Email Addresses from Web Content
scenario: Extract email addresses from a sample web content data set containing articles and contact information. Output should include extracted email addresses and their corresponding article titles. The output should be formatted as a table with email addresses as headers and should be limited to 150 words.
constraints: Email addresses must be properly formatted

evaluationCriteria.description: Judge checks if the output adheres to the specified constraints.
Judge checks if the output contains valid markdown syntax.
Judge checks if the extracted data is accurate and based on the provided web content data.
